query:
SELECT 
  campaignId,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  MIN(FROM_UNIXTIME(discoveredAt/1000)) as first_discovered,
  MAX(FROM_UNIXTIME(discoveredAt/1000)) as last_discovered
FROM outreach_leads
WHERE discoveredAt >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP('2026-03-24 00:00:00') * 1000
GROUP BY campaignId
ORDER BY campaignId;
